items.name: Immortal Karambit: Azurewraths Descent
items.description:
The Karambit, Azurewraths Descent is a stunningly crafted blade that merges celestial beauty with lethal precision. Featuring a curved, razor-sharp edge adorned with shimmering azure patterns resembling angelic wings, it evokes a sense of divine fury. The handle, wrapped in dark obsidian tones with silver accents, offers both elegance and unmatched grip. Perfect for collectors and combat enthusiasts alike, this karambit symbolizes the balance between grace and wrath, embodying its wielder's power and finesse.

Use 3D to see how it looks without glare
Karambit series
more here: https://www.roblox.com/groups/4668178/HellsGrave#!/store
